title: lemna abbreviata
intro: Lemna abbreviata, also known as lesser duckweed, is a small aquatic plant that belongs to the family Lemnaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of Lemna abbreviata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
